tender.description: Cleaning of old garland drain, Provision of new garland drain at Sayal-D OCP Mines and provision of Reinforcement Concrete pipe culvert at Sayal-D OCP mines as per monsoon action plan of Sayal-D OCP Under Sayal-D Project.
